title: The Joint Venture Between BP & Iberdrola EspaÃ±a Starts Construction Work On Spain's Largest Green Hydrogen Plant
content: BP PLC and Iberdrola SA have begun construction on a 25-megawatt renewable energy-based hydrogen facility in CastellÃ³n, which the companies say will be the biggest green hydrogen plant in Spain.To rise on about 20,000 square meters (215,278.21 square feet) of land next to a BP refinery, the project will source 200 gigawatt hours a year of electricity from Iberdrolaâ€™s solar and wind farms in the country via a power purchase agreement. Start-up is expected in the second half of 2026.
author: Analysts Account
